subcodes.first_line: From time immemorial, the glances of God have been directed towards His loved ones… The handmaids of God are today reckoned among the men; happy and blessed are they!
subcodes.first_line_orig: لازال اولیای الهی تحت لحاظ بوده اند و بانوار آفتاب حقیقت منور لسان عظمت بذکر
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @equality of men and women
